SEARCH
Package Model

Class Hospital

java.lang.Object
Model.Point
Model.Hospital
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Hospital extends Point
Represents a hospital point, also used as a Voronoi site.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Hospital(int id, String name, double x, double y, int maxCapacity)
    Creates a hospital with an identifier, name, position and maximum capacity.

  • Constructor Details

    • Hospital

      public Hospital(int id, String name, double x, double y, int maxCapacity)
      Creates a hospital with an identifier, name, position and maximum capacity.
      Parameters:
      id - the hospital identifier
      name - the hospital name
      x - the x-coordinate
      y - the y-coordinate
      maxCapacity - the maximum number of users the hospital can receive

  • Method Details

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns the name of the hospital.
      Returns:
      the name of the hospital

    • setName

      public void setName(String name)
      Updates the name of the hospital.
      Parameters:
      name - the new name of the hospital

    • getUsers

      public List<User> getUsers()
      Returns the users assigned to the hospital.
      Returns:
      the list of users assigned to the hospital

    • getMaxCapacity

      public int getMaxCapacity()
      Returns the maximum capacity of the hospital.
      Returns:
      the maximum capacity

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of the hospital.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Point
      Returns:
      a string containing the hospital information

    • isSaturated

      public boolean isSaturated()
      Checks whether the hospital is saturated.
      Returns:
      true if the hospital is saturated, false otherwise

    • getAvailableRoom

      public int getAvailableRoom()
      Returns the number of available rooms in the hospital.
      Returns:
      the number of available rooms

    • getSaturationRate

      public double getSaturationRate()
      Returns the saturation rate of the hospital.
      Returns:
      the saturation rate as a percentage

    • addUsers

      public void addUsers(User u)
      Adds a user to the hospital.
      Parameters:
      u - the user to add

    • removeUsers

      public void removeUsers(User u)
      Removes a user from the hospital.
      Parameters:
      u - the user to remove
